expected_outcome: Competent Next.js developer with a deep understanding of Server Components, File-based routing, server-side data fetching strategies, and server actions implementation.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily structuring route directories and mapping navigation structures.

mini_project.title: Blog Layout Directory
mini_project.description: Create a multi-folder blog structure with category paths, profile lists, custom loading boundaries, and headers.

phases.milestone: Mastered Next.js folder-based routing, layout configurations, component separation, and SEO metadata hooks.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily calling API endpoints, configuring tags, and testing revalidation triggers.

mini_project.title: News Feed Aggregator
mini_project.description: A dashboard querying articles from a news database with custom static configurations revalidating every 60 seconds.

phases.milestone: Proficient in fetch configurations, static vs dynamic outputs rendering, and caching mechanisms.

topics.name: Form Actions & Server Code
subtopics: Handling form submissions on the server

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing form handlers and testing server-side data mutations.

mini_project.title: Feedback Portal UI & Action
mini_project.description: Create an interactive feedback form page that writes reviews directly using Server Actions and updates the list.

phases.milestone: Capable of handling data updates securely, updating page lists, and managing loading states.

topics.name: Component Optimizations
subtopics: Next Image tags for responsive sizing

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily checking page sizes, mapping redirect rules, and configuring deployments.

mini_project.title: Optimized Gallery Page
mini_project.description: A high-performance responsive media grid utilizing next/image blur placeholders, custom fonts, and middleware redirection rules.

phases.milestone: Equipped to develop optimized, SEO-ready Next.js products and host them globally on serverless nodes.

major_projects.title: Integrated Collaborative Markdown Platform
major_projects.description: Develop a serverless document editor with auth checks via middleware, database persistence in MongoDB, Server Actions updates, dynamic metadata pages, and static documentation guides.
